taxa.why: Earliest spring emergence. When it's up, soil is thawing.

taxa.name: Dicentra cucullaria
taxa.why: Blooms just before peak morel time in rich woods.

taxa.name: Trillium
taxa.why: Traditional indicator — 'when trillium blooms, look for morels.'

taxa.name: Mertensia virginica

taxa.why: Spring ephemeral strong in both eastern and central morel habitats.
